subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Thy name is present before the Throne, and thy remembrance is mentioned in the Most Holy Court. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی اسمت لدی العرش حاضر و ذکرت در بساط اقدس مذکور طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort
